name: Nuclear Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a glass, microwave-safe bowl for about 45 seconds on high.
2. Remove from the microwave and add all remaining ingredients.
3. Stir until combined.
4. Place back into the microwave and cook on full power for approximately 2 1/2 minutes.
5. Mix well and pour into an 8-inch square, buttered baking dish.
6. Chill until set and store in the refrigerator or freezer.
